title: デビュー戦の後に・幕開け、ここから

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Dober trembles with joy after she manages
to display her full power in the race. She also
thanks everyone in the waiting room for their
support.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Following her debut, public opinion on Mejiro
Dober rises rapidly and all eyes turn to her as the
new hope for the Mejiro family!
